allow: Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\('playwright'\); \(async \(\) => { const browser = await chromium.launch\(\); const page = await browser.newPage\(\); await page.setViewportSize\({ width: 1440, height: 900 }\); await page.goto\('https://aevia-v1.webflow.io/templates/vows', { waitUntil: 'networkidle', timeout: 60000 }\); await page.screenshot\({ path: 'screenshots/aevia-vows.png', fullPage: true }\); console.log\('aevia done'\); await browser.close\(\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input&&i.tool_input.file_path||'';const blocked=['.env','serviceAccountKey.json','serviceAccountKey'];if(blocked.some(b=>p.includes(b))){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Blocked: this file contains secrets and Claude is not allowed to read it.'}));}else{process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:true}));}});"
